ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "problem_type" TEXT /* Type of problem the model solves (e.g., classification, regression) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the model */,
  "model_status" TEXT /* Status of the model (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model this configuration belongs to */,
  "activation" TEXT /* Activation function used in the model */,
  "alpha" REAL /* Regularization parameter */,
  "early_stopping" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether early stopping is enabled */,
  "hidden_layer_sizes" TEXT /* Sizes of the hidden layers */,
  "learning_rate" TEXT /* Learning rate strategy */,
  "max_iter" INTEGER /* Maximum number of iterations */,
  "solver" TEXT /* Solver used for optimization */,
  "batch_size" INTEGER /* Batch size for training */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric record */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration this metric record belongs to */,
  "mean_valid_accuracy" REAL /* Mean validation accuracy */,
  "mean_valid_precision" REAL /* Mean validation precision */,
  "mean_valid_auc" REAL /* Mean validation AUC */,
  "mean_valid_f1" REAL /* Mean validation F1 score */,
  "mean_valid_mse" REAL /* Mean validation MSE */,
  "mean_valid_mae" REAL /* Mean validation MAE */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric record was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the metric record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_metrics_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, data engineer, model auditor) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model this version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_access_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configuration_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the configuration */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the configuration was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_access_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_audit" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model this audit log entry belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Details of the action performed */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_audit_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_audit_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model this performance metric record belongs to */,
  "performance_metric" TEXT /* Type of performance metric (e.g., accuracy, precision, recall) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance metric record was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the performance metric record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model this hyperparameter belongs to */,
  "hyperparameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the hyperparameter was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the hyperparameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model this data source belongs to */,
  "data_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "data_source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., CSV, database) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data source was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sources_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model this collaboration belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user in the collaboration */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the collaboration (e.g., owner, editor) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the collaboration was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the collaboration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_collaborations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model this comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
